description:
Registry is the top-level index written to <out>/registry.json by
 `veil build`. It maps kind name → entry describing how to find that kind's
 compiled artifacts. Consumers (e.g. `veil render`) read this to discover
 which kinds are available in a build artifact.

additionalProperties.description: RegistryEntry describes a single kind in a Registry.

name.description: Name of the kind (matches the map key and Kind.name).

path.description: Relative path to the compiled kind.json (e.g. "./worker/kind.json").

schema.description:
Relative path to the kind's composite resource schema
 (e.g. "./worker/kind.schema.json").

additionalProperties.title: Registry Entry

kinds.description:
Kind name → entry pointing at the compiled kind document and its schema.
 All paths are resolved against the registry.json's own directory.

title: Registry
